text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, what a tragedy! Falling by the<n>wayside on
the slopes of Nakayama.<n>Victory was out of my
reach!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tumbling off the throne I have yet to<n>possess...
The fumbling Overlord...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but you need not worry<n>about me,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Stumbling blocks are essential to a<n>good story!
This result is not a bad<n>one, not in the least.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't seem too discouraged.<n>Her name is
on the scoreboard, so<n>she certainly isn't off to a
bad start.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Is that... all I can do?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I was sure I could make a better time.<n>Why...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What is that look on your face,<n>Ayabe? Unsatisfied
with the results<n>as well, are you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
All was not in vain. Our duet whipped<n>the Satsuki
Sho crowd into an uproar,<n>did it not?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I just... wasn't at my best.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh... Meaning?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You threw off my pace. My own<n>weakness is to
blame...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But still, if you hadn't been around...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, hatred has budded within<n>you—as is natural
for a rival.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, Ayabe, was it really my fault that<n>you weren't
at your best?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Either way, if this anger fuels your<n>improvement, I
do not mind it in the<n>least.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You don't know the first thing about<n>me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I do! I know it all! You are an<n>Umamusume
who wished to prevail in<n>the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the cause of your lapse in focus<n>lies within
your own mind.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Face your troubles as they arise, just<n>as I face
my reflection in the mirror<n>each day.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I bid you farewell!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: How did she... see right through me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She couldn't have. I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do I need to face myself?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Later that night...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
O stars above, laugh at my expense<n>for my failure
to achieve victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It is as you had predicted—I could not<n>win!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But how disheartened the others<n>would be had I
shined too brightly at<n>the beginning of the Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It appears the throne of the Centurial<n>Overlord is
still distant, so long as a<n>sliver of mercy remains
within my<n>heart...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O performs her soliloquy. It<n>seems this
loss provided her<n>inspiration for some good
material.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer. We must decide on my<n>next
objective.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Where is the coming stage on which I<n>would
dance?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The answer is already set. With one<n>crown gone,
we can only go after the<n>next.
choice_data_list:
It's on to the Tokyo Racecourse at the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, as I expected. Very well. I shall<n>make the sky
shine magnificently<n>over that Classic.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe will most likely... No, she will<n>definitely run
there, bringing her own<n>flair.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Behold, Trainer... The night sky.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: That shining glimmer... It's the Derby<n>Star!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's pointing to the North Star...<n>which now, as
I've just learned, has<n>a new name.
